calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2006 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise Hearing
Off Calendar May-09-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minors' Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Kathy Kollehner.
Stephen MacLean, Esq. for Petitioner: William Zhou, present as Guardian at litem for: Tiffany Zhou and Tricia Zhou, minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise of $125.00 is approved as to each Minor.
Medical Expenses $125.00 for each minor, to be paid from the Settlement funds.
A net balance of $0
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Aug-08-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2006 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-10-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
